item.title: What Is a Residential Proxy? Definition, Risks & Detection
item.description: Learn what residential proxies are, how they work, and why they’re used for both legitimate testing and malicious evasion. Explore risks, detection signals, and defenses.

item.title: How Residential Proxies Enable Lateral Movement Risk
item.description: Learn how residential proxy software enables lateral movement inside enterprise networks and creates hidden risk. See how to detect and mitigate proxy-driven exposure.

item.title: IP Intelligence Predictions for 2026: AI, Proxies & Risk
item.description: Explore IP intelligence predictions for 2026, from agentic AI traffic and residential proxies to passive security signals and real-time geo-verification.

item.title: Federal Student Aid Fraud Enabled by VPNs and Proxies
item.description: How fraudsters use VPNs and residential proxies to steal U.S. federal student aid and how advanced IP intelligence helps schools detect ghost student schemes.

item.title: MITRE D3FEND: IP Intelligence for Proxy Attacks
item.description: Learn how IP and session intelligence map to MITRE D3FEND controls to detect residential proxies, anonymized traffic, and proxy-based attacks.

item.title: IP Intelligence: The Anatomy of an IP Address
item.description: Explore the anatomy of an IP address and learn how IP intelligence reveals hidden risks, VPN use, and anonymized traffic behind online connections.

item.title: Spur IP Geo: Next-Gen IP Geolocation for Security and Compliance
item.description: Spur IP Geo grounds IP geolocation intelligence in technical analysis and verified data, eliminating dependence on crowdsourced corrections.

item.title: Anonymized Traffic, VPN, and Proxy Compliance
item.description: Learn what NIST, ISO, PCI DSS, GDPR, and other frameworks say about anonymized traffic, VPNs, and proxy compliance — and how to stay secure and compliant.

item.title: 5 Essential IP Enrichment Use Cases for Security, Fraud, and Threat Hunting
item.description: Discover how IP enrichment adds critical context to IP addresses, helping security and fraud teams detect anomalies, stop bots, and prevent account takeover.

item.title: Uncovering the Chinese Proxy Service Used in APT Campaigns
item.description: Spur uncovers WgetCloud, a Chinese proxy/VPN service leveraged in an APT campaign. Learn how Trojan nodes and IP intelligence reveal hidden infrastructure.

item.title: Introducing Next Generation IP Geolocation
item.description: Next Generation IP Geo, a new product currently in beta, specifically designed to provide security professionals with the precise and actionable location intelligence they need.

item.title: Astrill VPN and Remote Worker Fraud Detection
item.description: Learn how Astrill VPN is used in remote worker fraud and how IP intelligence helps security teams detect anonymized access and reduce risk.

item.title: Why Residential Proxies Are a Security Risk | White Paper
item.description: Learn how residential proxies enable fraud, ATO, and scraping — and get a practical framework to detect and mitigate obscured traffic. Download the white paper.

item.title: How to Reduce the Risk of Account Takeovers | White Paper
item.description: Explore how account takeover attacks work, why they’re increasing, and the detection strategies security and fraud teams use to prevent ATO at scale.
